title: Rename St Ann's-specific DTOs, struct fields, and method signatures
description: Systematically rename every St Ann's-specific identifier in the codebase to use generic home-club terminology. This is a mechanical but high-blast-radius change — it touches struct definitions, method signatures, template variable names, form field names, and CSS custom properties. It must be done in a single coordinated pass to avoid half-renamed inconsistencies. No behavioral logic changes — just names.
acceptance_criteria: FixtureWithRelations fields renamed: IsStAnnsHome → IsHomeClub, IsStAnnsAway → IsAwayClub, IsDerby → IsIntraClubDerby
IsStAnns field on club DTOs renamed to IsHomeClub
All service method names renamed — full list in technical notes
Form field names renamed: stanns_player_1 → home_player_1, stanns_player_2 → home_player_2
CSS class names renamed: stanns-home → club-home
All template references updated to match new field and variable names
No behavioral changes — all logic remains identical, only names change
make build-local succeeds with zero compilation errors
Full E2E test suite passes (tests reference page content, not Go identifiers)

approach: 1. Start with struct field renames in the DTO definitions — this will cause compilation errors that guide every other change
2. Fix all compilation errors in service files by updating field references
3. Rename method signatures and update all call sites
4. Update form field names in handlers (FormValue calls) and templates (input name attributes)
5. Update CSS custom properties and class names in templates
8. Run E2E tests to verify no template rendering breaks
technical_notes.risk_mitigation: Do this as a single atomic commit. The Go compiler will catch every missed rename in .go files. Template renames need manual verification — run the E2E suite and visually inspect key pages.

testing_requirements: make build-local compiles with zero errors
Manual verification: fixture detail page renders correctly with home/away styling
Manual verification: week overview page renders correctly
Manual verification: team selection page form submits correctly
Manual verification: standings page renders correctly
grep -r 'StAnns\|stanns\|st_anns' internal/ templates/ returns zero results (clean sweep)

context.user_story: As a developer deploying for a different club, I don't want to see 'StAnns' in the source code — it should use generic 'HomeClub' terminology that makes sense for any deployment
